sentence: 片中的主角是一位年轻的老师。
pinyin: Piàn zhōng de zhǔjué shì yī wèi niánqīng de lǎoshī.
english: The main character in the film is a young teacher.

sentence: 听到这首歌，她感到一阵忧伤。
pinyin: Tīng dào zhè shǒu gē, tā gǎndào yī zhèn yōushāng.
english: Hearing this song, she was overcome with grief.

meaning: 1. to visit (a meeting, class, trial etc)
sentence: 她申请旁听了一节大学公开课。
pinyin: Tā shēnqǐng pángtīng le yī jié dàxué gōngkāikè.
english: She applied to sit in on a university open lecture.

meaning: 1. to study on one's own; 2. self-study
sentence: 他利用空余时间自修英语。
pinyin: Tā lìyòng kòngyú shíjiān zìxiū Yīngyǔ.
english: He uses his free time to study English on his own.

sentence: 她的生活丰富多彩，令人羡慕。
pinyin: Tā de shēnghuó fēngfù duōcǎi, lìng rén xiànmù.
english: Her life is rich and colorful, which many people envy.
